description_long: This is a flexible juice pouch with a spout cap, featuring a vibrant design of peaches splashing into milk or juice on the front. The packaging is primarily orange and white, with a green 'Healthy Lifestyle' label near the top. The front of the pouch displays the product name 'YOUR FAVORITE JUICE!' and a short description in green and orange text. The pouch is made of a glossy, semi-transparent plastic material, and the spout is white with a ribbed screw cap. The back of the pouch shows a similar peach and milk illustration, along with a yellow panel that likely contains product information.
description: A glossy, flexible juice pouch with a white spout cap, decorated with peaches splashing into milk and vibrant orange and white colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main peach and milk splash illustration, 'Healthy Lifestyle' label, and product name.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pouch and the protruding spout cap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a similar peach and milk illustration and a yellow information panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the narrow edge and the spout cap from above.
